spec_match.rationale: Thumbnail strip + main view both animating concurrently — direct use of the feature.

interactive.rationale: Click any thumbnail to measure the independent main/thumbnail scrollers, or run the rapid-click test to drive two same-container targets 160ms apart.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The feature card now calls out both simultaneous independent-container scrolling and the same-container cancellation boundary.

edge_cases.rationale: Chrome DevTools MCP verified the normal Night Sky click moved the main scroller 2947px and thumbnail strip 251px with a pass card, the rapid-click test interrupted Night Sky at 163px and ended exactly on Sunset, reset returned both scrollers to 0, the pre-130 toggle showed the independent-container contrast, console/network were clean, and conformance reported 5 PASS / 0 FAIL.

summary: The gallery now demonstrates both parts of the boundary: independent scroll containers can animate together, while a rapid second target in the same container cancels the earlier smooth scroll.
